programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Mexico City Jumping - GCL R1 Competition Team
programme.desc: Held at Campo Marte in Mexico City, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. The program includes the Global Champions League team competition and the Grand Prix, where riders earn ranking points toward the season standings. Competition takes place at altitude, impacting horse performance and pace.

programme.title: Mozambique vs Mali - CAF U17 Africa Cup of Nations Morocco 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: CAF U17 Africa Cup of Nations is the annual African youth football tournament organized by Confederation of African Football (CAF) for players aged 17 and below. programme.desc: Angers have conceded five or more goals in three Ligue 1 matches this season – a joint-high tally alongside Metz – with their heaviest defeat coming against Strasbourg. After three consecutive home defeats against them between 2020 and 2022, Angers won their last home Ligue 1 match against Strasbourg, which also took place on MD33 last season.

programme.title: Metz vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Metz have lost 53% of their Ligue 1 matches against Lorient, compared to just 17% in Ligue 2. After drawing the reverse fixture 1-1 in January, Metz could avoid defeat in both of their matches against Lorient in the same season for the second time in their nine campaigns together in the top-flight, after having previously done so in 1998-99.

programme.title: Auxerre vs Nice - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: After having lost the reverse fixture 3-1 in August, Auxerre could lose both Ligue 1 matches against Nice in a single season for the first time since 2008-09. programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Brest - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Paris SG have scored 13 goals without conceding a single one in their last three matches against Brest in all competitions. Paris SG are on a 33-match unbeaten run against Brest in all competitions, the joint-longest unbeaten streak in their history against a single opponent.

programme.title: Finals - UEFA European Women’s U17

programme.title: Lamine Yamal - The Future Of Football
programme.desc: Lamine Yamal, a prodigy developed at La Masia, has risen at a remarkably young age to the world stage of football thanks to his talent, maturity and creativity. Through his rapid ascent, this documentary asks a key question : is he just an early phenomenon, or true embodiment of the future of modern football ?

programme.title: Qatar vs Ecuador - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Qatar and Ecuador have met three times previously, all matches taking place in Qatar – their head-to-head record is perfectly balanced with one win each and one draw. Their last encounter saw Qatar win 4-3 in a friendly in October 2018. Qatar are taking part in their first ever FIFA World Cup, whilst also being first nation from the Arab world to h

programme.title: Argentina vs Saudi Arabia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Argentina are unbeaten in all four of their previous meetings with Saudi Arabia, with this the first meeting between the sides at the FIFA World Cup. Argentina have qualified for their 18th FIFA World Cup, with Qatar 2022 being their 13th participation in a row, the third-longest current run after Brazil and Germany. Since 1978, only Germany have

programme.title: Denmark vs Tunisia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is the first encounter between Denmark and Tunisia at the FIFA World Cup. Their only previous meeting was a friendly 20 years ago in Japan, prior to the 2002 tournament; Denmark won 2-1. Denmark are unbeaten against African opposition at the FIFA World Cup whilst Tunisia have never prevailed against European opposition at the tournament.

programme.title: Qatar vs Ecuador - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Qatar and Ecuador have met three times previously, all matches taking place in Qatar – their head-to-head record is perfectly balanced with one win each and one draw. programme.title: Argentina vs Saudi Arabia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Argentina are unbeaten in all four of their previous meetings with Saudi Arabia, with this the first meeting between the sides at the FIFA World Cup. programme.desc: A daily Special Interview related to an important issue of the day. The interview offers the background and insight into the issue chosen from the world of sport.

programme.title: Special Report - 18/05/26
programme.desc: "Special Report" is a single long feature from one of beIN SPORTS News reporters that takes an alternative look at a subject from the world of sport.

programme.title: News Bulletin
programme.desc: Latest news from the beIn SPORTS News room, previewing and reviewing developments and scores with contribution from around the world from beIN's reporters.

programme.title: Tanzania vs Mozambique - CAF U17 Africa Cup of Nations Morocco 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: CAF U17 Africa Cup of Nations is the annual African youth football tournament organized by Confederation of African Football (CAF) for players aged 17 and below. Morocco was chosen as the host of this edition. The top 10 teams qualified for the 2026 FIFA U-17 World Cup in Qatar as the CAF representatives. Morocco are the defending champions.

programme.desc: La Liga 2 is the men's second professional association football division of the Spanish football league system. It is contested by 22 teams, with the top two teams plus the winner of a play-off promoted to La Liga and replaced by the three lowest-placed teams in that division.

programme.title: Finals - UEFA European Women’s U17
programme.desc: UEFA European Women’s U17 is the annual international youth football championship organized by UEFA for the women's under-17 national teams of Europe. The defending champions are the Netherlands, but are unable to defend their title as they did not qualify for this tournament. The top five teams will qualify for the 2026 FIFA U-17 Women's World Cup
